title: Empty or whitespace script argument
description: tools/run_matlab_safe.bat resolves missing %1 to the current working directory; pre_execution_guard.ps1 rejects non-file paths. MATLAB is not launched (exit 2).
detection_signal: PRE_EXECUTION_GUARD=FAIL, stderr PRE_EXECUTION_INVALID_SCRIPT, row in tables/pre_execution_failure_log.csv
notes: docs/repo_execution_rules.md pre-execution guard

title: Script path not an existing file
description: Guard requires Test-Path leaf; missing or mistyped path blocks launch.
notes: Switching canonical path must exist per tables/switching_canonical_entrypoint.csv

title: Path not a .m file
description: Guard requires extension .m (case-insensitive).

title: Path resolution failure in guard
description: PowerShell GetFullPath or guard logic throws; logged as path_resolution_failed.

title: MATLAB executable missing or not on PATH
description: Wrapper calls `matlab -batch` with no pre-check for matlab.exe; OS returns error before user script runs.
detection_signal: Console error from CMD; no run_dir artifacts from Switching script
notes: Not logged to pre_execution_failure_log; distinguish from FP001

title: MATLAB fails before -batch runs user script
description: Install/licensing crash, immediate MATLAB process exit; user script never executes.
detection_signal: No Switching run artifacts; wrapper may show AFTER_MATLAB_CALL with nonzero exit
notes: Classify as NO SIGNAL per repo signaling rules

title: Manual validate_matlab_runnable.ps1 workflow abort
description: Batch file does not invoke the validator (docs/repo_execution_rules). If a human/automation runs the validator and stops on WARN/NOT_PASS, execution never starts.
notes: Validator exits 0 even on NOT_PASS; blocking is procedural not exit-code

title: Agent ASCII policy stop
description: docs/repo_execution_rules require NON_ASCII_COUNT=0 before run; agent stops without invoking wrapper.
notes: Policy-only; not enforced by batch

title: Parse or load-time error before any runtime line
description: If MATLAB cannot parse the .m file, `run()` fails before try/catch in run_switching_canonical.m; no execution_status.csv from script.
detection_signal: No execution_status.csv under run_dir; no execution_probe_top.txt
notes: MATLAB exit nonzero; console may show error — silent relative to signaling contract only

title: Error before try block after partial top-level execution
description: Lines 1-17: top-level code before `try` (e.g. addpath failure). Catch block does not run; no FAILED status write.
notes: Rare; depends on failure before line 18

title: write_execution_marker swallowing failures
description: tools/write_execution_marker.m uses empty catch; ENTRY/STAGE markers may be absent with no raised error.
detection_signal: Missing runtime_execution_markers.txt or fallback tables/runtime_execution_markers_fallback.txt despite run
notes: Observability gap only

title: MATLAB runs but SCRIPT_ENTERED not reached
description: Failure between `try` start and disp SCRIPT_ENTERED in Switching/analysis/run_switching_canonical.m (e.g. restoredefaultpath/addpath/createRunContext resolution errors).
detection_signal: No SCRIPT_ENTERED in diary; may still get FAILED in catch if error is inside try after line 18
notes: If error before line 22: catch writes FAILED if createRunContext eventually available — see FP013

title: Signaling contract gap mid-startup
description: execution_status.csv PARTIAL written at ~line 67 before execution_probe_top.txt at ~line 70; crash between leaves run_dir + PARTIAL status but no execution_probe_top.txt.
notes: Violates execution order in docs/repo_execution_rules signaling list

title: Relying on MATLAB exit code as success
description: docs/repo_execution_rules state MATLAB exit code is not a valid run indicator; wrapper propagates ERRORLEVEL.
notes: SILENT_FAILURE at interpretation layer

title: PARTIAL checkpoint before completion
description: Script writes EXECUTION_STATUS=PARTIAL before full pipeline and final SUCCESS row.
notes: Expected mid-run; becomes inconsistent if process stops before probe or final writes

title: Crash or kill after PARTIAL but before SUCCESS
description: Killed process after data work; execution_status may remain PARTIAL; tables may be incomplete.
detection_signal: PARTIAL status; missing switching_canonical_* outputs or truncated CSVs

title: Missing run_manifest.json on fallback failure path
description: catch ME uses alternate run_dir via mkdir when createRunContext fails in catch helper; may omit manifest vs createRunContext success path.
notes: docs/infrastructure_laws.md / docs/run_system.md require manifest at run root for canonical runs

title: Required CSV/MD contract vs subdirectory layout
description: run_switching_canonical.m writes tables/*.csv and reports/*.md; if interrupted before first writetable, only status/probe may exist.
notes: docs/run_system.md requires at least one CSV and one MD under run_dir tree

title: Outputs without wrapper execution
description: Manual copy, artifact restore, or direct matlab invocation bypassing tools/run_matlab_safe.bat leaves files under results/Switching/runs without matching process provenance.
detection_signal: Artifacts on disk; no matching log/manifest fingerprint story
notes: docs/repo_execution_rules forbid direct matlab for agent runs

title: execution_status SUCCESS with incomplete science outputs
description: Interrupted write after status update (theoretical) or manual edit of status file.
notes: Low probability if script order holds

title: Fallback marker in tables/runtime_execution_markers_fallback.txt
description: write_execution_marker writes to repo tables/ when run_dir unknown; suggests execution signal without run-scoped isolation.
detection_signal: Fallback file updated; no run_dir markers
notes: docs/infrastructure_laws global output policy tension

title: Stale run_dir reused or mixed with new expectations
description: Human reuses folder or partial cleanup.
detection_signal: Old execution_status.csv with new partial writes

title: Upstream raw path missing or inaccessible
description: run_switching_canonical parses parentDir from Switching ver12/main/Switching_main.m; error if dir missing or no Temp Dep subfolders.
notes: Caught; not silent — documented Switching-specific

title: No samples after processing loops
description: error run_switching_canonical:NoSamples if rows empty — user sees FAILED status

title: Dead runner artifact in batch
description: run_matlab_safe.bat creates temp_runner_*.m with pause(1) but MATLAB_COMMAND uses user script only; RUNNER_ENTERED probe is not part of actual invocation.
detection_signal: Misleading debug narrative if expecting RUNNER_ENTERED from batch
notes: docs/repo_execution_rules debug layer vs current bat implementation
